intro: Mnesithea triflora, also known as Triplaris, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it beneficial for cardiovascular health and the treatment of various diseases. The bioactive constituents of Mnesithea triflora include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
